content:
🌟 AnimateAnyMesh | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: Generating animated 3D meshes from static meshes and text descriptions.
✨ Key Features: • Feed-forward universal mesh animation framework • Text-driven animation generation • High-quality animation in seconds • Supports arbitrary 3D meshes • DyMesh Dataset and VAE/RF models released
📖 Summary: AnimateAnyMesh is a feed-forward 4D foundation model designed for universal mesh animation. It takes a static 3D mesh and a text prompt as input to generate high-quality animations efficiently in seconds.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
